rationale.summary: This PR newline-terminates and flushes hash-ring parser CLI error diagnostics without changing parser logic, control flow, return codes, serialization, or public APIs. The walkthrough shows the change is limited to stderr formatting in the helper paths for file-open, protobuf parse, JSON conversion, JSON parse, and exception diagnostics.

keyPoints.point: The only changed cohort is hash-ring parser stderr formatting in tests/st/hashring_parser.cpp.
The changed statements append std::endl to existing std::cerr diagnostics while preserving existing parser and placement behavior.
The overview risk band is Low and contains no hard-break findings.

critique_ledger.title: Missing regression coverage for newline-terminated CLI errors
critique_ledger.rationale: This PR fixes the observable stderr contract for hashring_parser error paths, but no test would fail if the std::endl additions were removed again. The open-file, parse, encode, and exception diagnostics could regress back to concatenating with the next message or shell prompt without CI catching it.

reasons: no blocking risk band, adherence failure, or L4-pending cohort
